title: minio 大量占用 CPU ，可能是什么原因？
content: Minio on the NAS is consuming over 15 % CPU and continuous disk I/O even without external read/write activity. Likely causes include background health checks, data integrity verification, or internal compaction and garbage‑collection processes. These operations can generate significant CPU and I/O load during standard Minio operation or after recent upgrades. Ensuring the system is updated, monitoring configuration, and checking Minio logs will help identify the exact workload.
eventKey: minio-大量占用-cpu-可能是什么原因
normalizedTitle: minio 大量占用 cpu 可能是什么原因

title: [开源] 当 AI Agent 学会三思而后行
content: The article discusses the security risks of open‑source AI agents that directly execute commands suggested by cloud models. It introduces Kocort’s Dual‑Brain Architecture, where a cloud LLM handles intent and strategy, while a local, low‑resource “cerebellum” model performs semantic safety reviews before any tool call executes. This model checks intent alignment, data leakage, destructive actions, injection attacks, and sandbox boundaries, providing a second‑chance filter without cross‑network exposure. Though it adds memory usage and latency, it dramatically reduces malicious or accidental harm, proposing a practical standard for secure AI agents.
eventKey: agent-学会三思而后行
normalizedTitle: 开源 当 ai agent 学会三思而后行

title: 分享一个 AI Agent 开发中最常见的坑：任务声明 ≠ 任务完成
content: In multi-agent systems, agents often misjudge task completion by treating any successful tool call (e.g., HTTP 200) as finished, ignoring that the content may still be pending approval or not actually published. Common pitfalls include assuming file write success, trusting local checks over external visibility, and declaring readiness before asynchronous operations finish. The fix is to parse response bodies for explicit success flags, verify written content by reading it back, and implement async confirmation or polling. This ensures agents validate real status rather than just operational actions.
eventKey: 分享一个-agent-开发中最常见的坑-任务声明-任务完成
normalizedTitle: 分享一个 ai agent 开发中最常见的坑 任务声明 ≠ 任务完成

title: K8s Admin：一个轻量级的多集群 Kubernetes 管理平台
content: K8s Admin is a lightweight, open‑source multi‑cluster Kubernetes management platform built with Next.js 16, React 19, and PostgreSQL. It supports adding clusters via kubeconfig, ServiceAccount tokens, or EKS token, provides full resource management, in‑browser YAML editing, pod terminals, real‑time logs, RBAC with customizable roles, application release tracking with Feishu notifications, and audit logs. Its minimal resource footprint (~100 MB) and simple deployment (single container + PostgreSQL) make it a practical alternative to heavier solutions like Rancher or the closed‑source KubeSphere.
eventKey: k8s-admin-一个轻量级的多集群-kubernetes-管理平台
normalizedTitle: k8s admin 一个轻量级的多集群 kubernetes 管理平台

title: 电费只占5%，谁在真正吃掉算力成本？
content: A 1 GW data center’s $55 bn total cost shows GPU hardware (45 %) dominates, while electricity accounts for only 5 %. Power, cooling, networking, and storage each add up to the remaining 82 %. GPU costs are hard to cut because of 4–5 nm fabrication, HBM memory, and CoWoS packaging monopolized by a few suppliers. China’s GPU makers face supply‑chain limits but may gain market share as export controls rise, though performance and ecosystem gaps remain.
eventKey: 电费只占5-谁在真正吃掉算力成本
normalizedTitle: 电费只占5 谁在真正吃掉算力成本

Nordeen, a former Tesla Autopilot project manager, had been Musk’s close aide at xAI, handling project timelines, risk, and AI infrastructure negotiations. title: 跨种杂交主要发生在尼安德特男性与现代人女性之间 | 原文
content: The study published in *Science* finds that interbreeding between Neanderthals and early modern humans was predominantly between Neanderthal males and modern human females. This pattern explains why Neanderthal ancestry in present-day humans is uneven, especially the pronounced scarcity of Neanderthal DNA on the X chromosome. The scarcity may result from either deleterious Neanderthal X‑chromosome variants removed by natural selection or from the male‑female mating pattern that limited Neanderthal X DNA contribution.

title: 光刻机巨头，轰然“倒塌”
content: Nikon, once a dominant lithography maker, now faces an 850 billion‑yen loss forecast, with only nine legacy machines sold in the past six months. Its failure followed a stalled move to immersion lithography and costly, unviable EUV projects, coupled with overreliance on Intel and loss of China sales. ASML has cemented its monopoly in EUV and advanced packaging, while Canon survives in mature‑process niches and explores nano‑imprint technology. The shift shows that open collaboration and adaptation are essential for survival in the lithography industry.
eventKey: 光刻机巨头-轰然“倒塌”
normalizedTitle: 光刻机巨头 轰然“倒塌”

title: 科技巨头估值范式的崩塌！
content: The article argues that the classic internet valuation model—high traffic and low marginal costs—is collapsing because AI services require substantial compute, turning energy into cost. Rising GPU and power expenses now drive margins, erasing economies of scale. Companies must focus on energy efficiency and inexpensive power infrastructure, redefining value from user count to per‑token cost. Consequently, capital shifts toward power and data‑center assets, and the future competitive edge lies in controlling cheap electricity, not just software or traffic dominance.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 美股大滑头
eventKey: 科技巨头估值范式的崩塌
normalizedTitle: 科技巨头估值范式的崩塌

title: 2026 03 29 HackerNews
content: Spanish legislation is stored as a Git repository, with each law as a Markdown file and each amendment as a commit, preserving the full history since 1960. Stanford released “Jai,” a lightweight Linux sandbox that isolates AI agents using copy‑on‑write layers to prevent file system damage. macOS window‑corner consistency was fixed via dynamic library injection that standardizes corner rounding without disabling SIP. Stanford research found AI giving interpersonal advice tends to over‑affirm users, reducing empathy and conflict‑resolution skills. Britain’s renewables now supply >90% of electricity, with the grid relying on wind, solar, and storage to replace coal. CERN deploys ultra‑compact AI models on FPGAs for sub‑nanosecond LHC data filtering. AMD’s Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 Dual Edition packs 208 MB of 3D V‑Cache across two chips, boosting gaming performance. Further HN discussions cover AI sandbox settings, Spanish legal Git projects, and critiques of macOS design assumptions.
eventKey: 2026-hackernews
normalizedTitle: 2026 03 29 hackernews

content: OpenAI released a “Codex Use Cases” library covering data, engineering, front‑end, and more, showing practical programming and non‑programming applications. Feishu (Lark) launched an open‑source CLI tool, lark‑cli, enabling AI agents to interact across 11 core business domains without extra configuration. OpenAI announced that its AI video tool Sora will shut down in April, with its API following in September. fnOS added an OpenClaw app installation route, while the RaBitQ team criticized Google’s TurboQuant paper for alleged academic misconduct. Reports suggest Google may invest over $5 billion in Anthropic’s Texas data center, and Google DeepMind’s new Gemma 4 model is expected soon.

title: 如果 5x 持续限额，是否不犹豫的升级到 20x 之后再考虑其他方案？
content: The post discusses the author's experience using Opus for coding and Sonnet for running data, with multiple agents (e.g., 39) leading to frequent hour limits. They tried Codex 5.4 but found it much slower than Claude. The author also asks whether domestic large models have strong data‑crawling capabilities.

title: 奥地利拟立法禁止 14 岁以下儿童使用社交媒体，6 月底出草案
content: Austria plans to pass a law banning users under 14 from social media, with a draft due by the end of June. The move follows concerns that platform algorithms harm children. The bill will use a “feature restriction” approach for various high‑risk online apps and introduce a two‑step online age verification system to prevent privacy leaks. Simultaneously, primary and secondary schools will add online media literacy and AI courses, while trimming Latin and some foreign languages to strengthen digital skills for minors.

title: 遭中国学界集体「拉黑」后 NeurIPS 道歉
content: NeurIPS issued a public apology after it barred submissions from certain U.S.‑sanctioned institutions, a decision that sparked backlash from Chinese academic societies such as the China Computer Federation. These groups called for a boycott of the conference and refusal to provide services or accept papers. Media outlets reported the incident and the subsequent apology by NeurIPS, highlighting the controversy over the organization’s submission guidelines.

title: 杭州、三亚和苏州入选联合国「迈向零废物的城市」名单
content: Three Chinese cities—Hangzhou, Sanya, and Suzhou—have been named in the United Nations’ inaugural list of “Cities Moving Towards Zero Waste.” Hangzhou employs digital tools to improve waste segregation and resource recovery while encouraging green lifestyles. Sanya integrates a zero‑waste model into its tourism‑heavy “Waste‑Free City” plan to protect its ecosystem. Suzhou has achieved comprehensive coverage for collection, transport, and treatment of rural and urban waste, addressing large‑scale waste-management challenges.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 财联社

title: 大家帮忙看看跑本地大模型哪个方法更好点, 以及云端调用 api 的方法.
content: Compare two local‑model setups: cherry Studio with Ollama extends beyond plain chat, while AnythingLLM plus llama.cpp offers flexible GPU/CPU allocation and lower resource usage. To use 80% of work locally and hand off the final 20% to cloud APIs for higher precision, integrate local inference for bulk processing and switch to cloud calls only for the refined outputs. For cost‑saving on cloud APIs, consider solutions like cc‑switch or set up a local proxy such as sub2api, though no specific registration tool is endorsed.

title: 心动2025年报点评和26年展望
content:
一、tap +adn 为什么把tap+adn放一起？

财报里adn收入放在游戏分部里其它下面，这是因为adn的股权是心动网络持有的，而不是tap持有的（tap目前有11%左右股权在外面，所以由心动持有更好，而不是tap，由tap持有话归母利润会被双重稀释）

1、二个业务有协同，而且性质类似，都是广告业务

2、在回收龙成的少数股东权益后，目前在外的少数股东权益就是tap的11.5%左右（主要是吉比特的）、adn的三分之一左右，即24年下半年和25年报表里的少数股东权益就是来自这二个，这意味着可以用它们来反推出tap+adn这个组合的盈利能力…
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 逸修1

title: Kiro 免费用上 Claude Sonnet 4.5
content: Kiro is an AI IDE from Amazon based on VS Code, using Claude Sonnet 4.5. It offers a free monthly allotment of 500 AI interactions (chat, agent, code completion) on macOS, Windows, and Linux, and requires an AWS Builder ID (no credit card). After downloading and logging in, users access Claude via a chat panel. Code completion doesn’t consume quota. Compared to Cursor’s free plan (50 interactions, GPT‑4o/Claude mix), Kiro’s 500 interactions provide a more generous free tier.

title: 保险行业年报全览：市赚率体系下，高估卖出的保险股，是否值得回补？
content: The article introduces “price‑earnings rate” (PR), a ratio of PE to ROE, and its adjustments for dividend payout. Using PR, the author evaluates insurance stocks, noting that unstable ROE requires adjusting the formula with industry averages. In January 2026, the author liquidated the insurance sector after the industry leader Ping An surpassed a 1 PR threshold. Following a 30% drop, Ping An’s PR fell to ~0.88, close to a target of 0.6. Dividend yields, even after tax, remain above the risk‑free rate, suggesting potential value.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - ericwarn丁宁

title: Claude Pro 信用卡频频被拒？用 N26 + Apple Pay 丝滑升级保姆级教程
content: To subscribe to Claude Pro using a N26 virtual card, first set up an N26 EU account with a verified address, then transfer funds from a ZA Bank Hong Kong account to Wise, convert HKD to EUR, and transfer the EUR to N26 via SEPA. Register an account on claude.ai with a Gmail address, verify a foreign‑number (e.g., an eSIM or European SIM), and then upgrade to Pro using the N26 card or Apple Pay. Ensure your billing address matches the N26 address, keep a stable network connection, and maintain enough balance for automatic monthly renewal.
eventKey: claude-pro-信用卡频频被拒-n26-apple-pay
normalizedTitle: claude pro 信用卡频频被拒 用 n26 apple pay 丝滑升级保姆级教程
